title: capsella australis
intro: Capsella australis, also known as shepherds purse, is a flowering plant in the mustard family that is native to Australia and New Zealand. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of Capsella australis include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting immune function, making it a valuable herb in natural remedies. Capsella australis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
